title: Odysseus role when integrated
decision: Odysseus is out of v0. Its role (task executor, task source, or both) is deferred to a post-v0 integration RFC.
unblock_condition: A post-v0 RFC assigning Odysseus an explicit executor/source role with authority boundaries and owner sign-off.
deferral_rollback_rule: Odysseus is excluded from the v0 task graph and authority model.
